CustomField.formula: OR( ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c , "Certified - Pending Final Documents"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c ,"Certified - Backup"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c ,"Certified - Pending Closing"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c ,"Certified - On Hold"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c ,"Current Owner"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c ,"Current Renter"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c ,"Past Owner"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c ,"Past Renter") )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Certified by status for reports. Checked true for following statuses: Certified - Pending Final Documents,Certified - Pending Closing,Current Owner,Current Renter,Past Owner,Past Renter
CustomField.label: Certified
